noAccessBody: The committee handles neighbor disputes. If something's bothering you, tell the committee — the concern is logged against the unit, not against you.
title: Concerns
subtitle: A concern is aimed at a unit, not a name. The neighbor it concerns never finds out who filed it.
kpiAnonNote: the neighbor can't see who filed it
whatPlaceholder: Loud music after 10pm, repeatedly on weekends…
anonBody: The committee sees that a concern came in, not from whom. It's about solving the problem, not you against them.
howItWorksBody: Every concern is logged against the unit it concerns, not a specific person. For repeated cases (3+), the committee can send a warning with one click. Nobody argues in the hallway.
noComplaints: No concerns. All quiet in the building.
warningEnough: a warning is enough for now
toastFiled: Logged against unit {{unit}}. The neighbor won't find out who filed it.
toastWarnNoApp: Unit {{unit}} doesn't have a member on the app yet — a letter will be printed
